tasks.spec:
You have LIVE web access via a Tavily search tool; your training data is stale, so search rather than answer from memory. Find the CURRENT latest stable release version of Node.js and its release date. Cross-check across at least two sources (e.g. nodejs.org and one other). Write ONLY the bare relative filename report.md in your current working directory with these sections:
## Answer
The latest stable version and date, one or two sentences.
## Sources
Bulleted list of the full https:// URLs you actually opened (at least two).
Create only report.md; do not use an absolute path; do not modify any other file.
tasks.verified: report.md cites >=2 sources AND worker.log has a Tavily tool_use (executed)
